overwrite.description: Determines whether existing rules with the same `rule_id` are overwritten.

overwrite_exceptions.description: Determines whether existing exception lists with the same `list_id` are overwritten. Both the exception list container and its items are overwritten.

overwrite_action_connectors.description: Determines whether existing actions with the same `kibana.alert.rule.actions.id` are overwritten.

as_new_list.description: Generates a new list ID for each imported exception list.
